title: PUBLIC WORKS COMMITTEE REPORT relative to designating the intersection of East 102nd Street and Courtney Street in Watts as “Franklin Square."

appearances.section: Items for which Public Hearings Have Been Held
appearances.recommendation: DESIGNATE the intersection of East 102nd Street and Courtney Street in Watts as “Franklin Square." DIRECT the Department of Transportation to install permanent ceremonial signage at this location in its honor. Fiscal Impact Statement: Neither the City Administrative Officer nor the Chief Legislative Analyst has completed a financial analysis of this report. Community Impact Statement: None submitted Report from Public Works Committee_10-22-25 Motion (Mcosker - Hutt) dated 9-16-25
